reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
각자 개성 강한 고양이들을 4마리 키우는 사냥이네에요
성격이 다른만큼 반응하는 장난감도 다른 사냥이들이지만
호불호없이 제일 사랑하는 자동 꼬리잡기 장난감
캐치더스네이크에요🖤 
기존 캐치더마우스가 있었는데 하도 좋아해서 수시로 켜두다보니 건전지 소모가 많았는데 이 부분이 개선되어 씨타입 충전식으로 바뀌고 이제 정말 완벽해져버렸다구요ㅠㅠ
너무너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 역시 매일 충전이 일이랍니댜
캐치더 스네이크 못잃어....🐍💚💚💚
reviews.content_en: I'm Sangnyi, raising 4 cats with very distinct personalities. Even though each cat reacts differently to toys depending on their temperament, the automatic tail-chasing toy that they all love without exception is Catch the Snake 🖤 I had the previous Catch the Mouse, and they loved it so much that I kept turning it on all the time, which ate through batteries like crazy. But this has been improved—it now comes with a rechargeable C-type battery and it's finally become absolutely perfect 🥺 They play with it SO much that charging it every day has become my daily routine lol Can't live without Catch the Snake... 🐍💚💚💚

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애들 집중력 어마무시해요~~~
저번 궁팡에서 못 업어와서 땅치고 후회했는데
나오기만을 기다렸어요~~
어이들이 좋아해요:-)
reviews.content_en: The kids' concentration is insane!!! I missed out on getting it last time at the pop-up and I was so mad, kicking myself. I've been waiting for it to come back out~~ The kids absolutely love it :-))

reviews.name: 티모
reviews.content:
캐치더스네이크 완성되자마자 뺏은 티모누나입니다 😚
먼저 리뉴얼된 디자인..제 취향저격... 일러스트가 너무 귀여운 ㅠㅠ
원체 얌전해서 티모가 놀아줄까 ? 하는 의심이 있었는데
저희 티모가 노는 장난감이면 ?! 대부분의 고양님들이 좋아할 것이라고 확신합니다...!!!!
티모는 집중 시간이 좀 짧아서 한번 완충해두면 엄청 오래 쓸 것 같아요 🥳
reviews.content_en: This is Timo unnie, who snatched Catch the Snake the moment it was released 😚 First of all, the redesigned look... totally my style... the illustrations are so adorable 🥺 Timo is naturally pretty calm, so I was wondering if she'd even play with it? But if my Timo plays with it, I'm convinced most cats would love it...!!!! Since Timo's play sessions are a bit short, once you charge it up, it seems like it'll last forever 🥳

reviews.name: 뽀또오뜨
reviews.content:
스네이크 깔아주자마자 두 마리 모두 초집중 👀
랜덤모드 15분 타이머 해두었는데 4번 켜준 것 같아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
뽀또가 바스락 거리는 재질을 좋아해서 기대중이었는데, 예상보다 더 격한 반응 ..!
장난감 사망하면 다른 리필 장난감 구매해서 연결해주려구요 ~~~~!!
오래오래 함께 하고 싶은 캐치더스네이크 🐍
reviews.content_en: The moment I put the Snake down, both of them went into ultra-focus mode 👀 I set it to random mode with a 15-minute timer and ended up turning it on like 4 times lol Bbotto loves that crinkly texture so I was really looking forward to it, and the reaction was even more intense than expected..! When the toy eventually breaks, I'm planning to buy a refill toy and connect it 💫 Catch the Snake is something I want to share with them for a long long time 🐍

reviews.name: 통후추
reviews.content:
후추는 원래 자동장난감을 잘 안 가지고 노는 냥이입니다 🐈‍⬛
그런데 스네이크는 반응이 좋더라구요 !! 완전 신기했어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
블랙앤화이트 에디션이라 마음에 쏙 들었어요 ~~
검정 고양이와 함께하고 있어서 더욱 🖤
스네이크 장난감 원래도 좋아하는 친구였다면 강추입니다 !
reviews.content_en: Huchu is a cat who doesn't usually play much with automatic toys 🐈‍⬛ But she reacted really well to the Snake!! I was totally surprised haha The Black and White edition was right up my alley too ~~ And since I have a black cat, it's even better 🖤 If your cat is already into snake toys, I highly recommend it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 사람이 집에 없는 시간이 길어서 조금이나마 덜 심심했으면 해서 사봤어요 직전에 이거 말고 다른 자동장난감 샀었는데 반응이없더라구요.. 애들이 틈새에 장난감 숨겨서 노는 걸 좋아해서 이건 좀 반응이 있을까 하고 샀는데 잘 노네요 사람 없을때만 꺼내두고 숨겨두고 하는데 요새는 처음보단 살짝 반응이 덜하긴 하지만 그래도 좋아하는 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: Since I'm away from home for long periods, I bought this hoping to keep my cats from getting too bored. I had tried a different automatic toy before this one, but they didn't react to it at all. My cats like to hide toys in tight spaces and play with them, so I was hoping this would get a reaction—and they do play with it! I only take it out when no one's home and hide it away, but lately they're not as interested as they were at first. Still, they seem to like it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
🩵일단 배송이 무지 빨리 왔어요🩵
요새 집사가 너무 바빠서 잘 못 놀아주고 있었던지라 애들이 좀 새침해하던 찰나 요 캐치더스네이크 덕분에 엄청 신난 하루가 되었어요!
일단 포장 뜯고 조립하는거부터 너무 쉬워서 금방 뚝딱이었고요,
본격적으로 전원 켜기 전에 장난감 냄새맡게 해줬는데 너무 좋아했어요 ㅋㅋㅎㅋㅋㅎ
전원 버튼 누르면 3가지 모드로 돌아가는데, 3살 고양이들도 재밌게 놀 정도로 단순하면서도 빨리 흥미를 잃지 않을 수 있는 좋은 장난감인 것 같아요☺️

무엇보다 제가 몇 번 버튼을 누르는걸 보더니 저희집 애기는 혼자서 켜는 방법을 터득해서, 제가 끄고 방에 들어가면 혼자서 다시 켜고 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 너무 귀엽고 웃겨요 ㅎㅎ
바스락 거리는 천 아래로 장난감이 계속 움직이니까 너무 좋아하더라고요! 숨숨집 터널에서 지켜보다가 나와서 왁!!!!! 하고 잡으려고 하는게 진짜 너무 귀여운 부분이에요..
집사들이 노동없이 아이들의 귀여움을 맘껏 맛보기에 가장 최적의 장난감입니다🩵
reviews.content_en: 🩵The shipping came super fast!🩵 Lately I've been so busy that I haven't been able to play with them much, and my cats were being a bit sulky about it, but thanks to CATCH THE SNAKE, they had an amazing day! The unboxing and assembly were so easy—I had it ready in no time. Before turning it on, I let them smell the toy first and they absolutely loved it ㅋㅋㅎㅋㅋㅎ When you press the power button, it runs in 3 different modes, and it seems like such a great toy—simple enough that even my 3-year-old cats find it fun, yet engaging enough that they don't lose interest too quickly ☺️ What's most impressive is that after watching me press the button a few times, my cat figured out how to turn it on by herself, and now whenever I turn it off and leave the room, she turns it back on and plays with it by herself ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ It's so cute and hilarious ㅎㅎ The toy keeps moving under the rustling fabric, which she absolutely loves! The cutest part is when she watches from inside the hideaway tunnel, comes out, and tries to pounce with a big "pounce!!!" This toy is absolutely perfect for cat parents to enjoy their cats' cuteness without any effort on our part 🩵

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
만두는 캐치더마우스 정말 정말 좋아하는데!!!(최애) 좋은기회로 캐치더 스네이크 체험단에 참여할 수 있게 되어 후기를작성합니다!!

만두는 막대 장난감중에서도 뱀막대기 정말 좋아하는데 
뱀+캐치더스네이크 가 만났다!-?! 안좋아할수가 없다~!
일주일 넘는동안 사용해본 결과! 

❤️장점
1..외관이 귀엽다 : 어니 장난감이 너무 귀여워요 ㅋㅋㅋ그냥 거실에 던져둬도 공간차지 아니구 그냥 오브제 감성 물씬...
근데 잠결에 거실에서 보면 가끔씩 만두인줄 알고 착각해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
2.충전식 장난감 : 캐치더 마우스의 단점 ㅠㅠ 건전지 쿠팡에서 대량구매해서 사용했었는데 스네이크는 충전식이구요 배송온날 딱 하루 충전했는데 5일동안 왜 계속 작동이 유지될정도로 가성비 나온다~!~! 
3.활용도: 말해모해(positive) 진짜 동영상 작동만 하면 얼음이 되버려서 ㅠㅠㅠ 못찍엇는데 외출할때 틀어놓으면 집사 나가든말든 신경도 안쓰고 하루종일 뱀만 쳐다보고 있어요...진짜 조금 섭섭해...
고리형으로 되어있어서 뱀 말고도 다른 미끼를 바꿀 수 있어서 하루하루 다른 장난감을 걸어주고 있습니다!(그래도 뱀이 젤 반응 굿)

기타등등 안살 이유가 없다~~
그치만 조오금 아쉬운점을 적어본다면
💦아쉬운점 

1.느리다: 마우스에 익숙해진 만두에게는 조금 회전속도가 느리네요!!  반응이 없는건 아닌데 막 달려가지 않고 누워가지고 뱀을 가지고 놀아요~~ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ그것도 나름대로 귀여워서 ㅜㅜ 그치만 스피드를 좋아하는 고양이는 조금 아쉬울 수 도 있을거 같네욥! 


2.바스락 천이 작아요 : 마우스에 비해 크기가 아주아주조금 작은 차이가 나네요~~그치만 뭐 사실 첨엔 아쉬웟는데 잘 갖고 노는거 보니깐 집사만 아쉽고 고양이는 신경도 안쓰는 ◜◡◝.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

그치만 정말 고양이가 안좋아할수 없는 장난감...!-!.!-!-!
친구집에 8살 고양이도 틀어줬는데 냅다 반응이 와버린....!!!!!!
애기 성묘 상관없이 다 가지고 노는 장난감 입니다~!!💕
reviews.content_en: Mandu absolutely loves CATCH THE MOUSE (it's her favorite!) and I was so lucky to participate in the CATCH THE SNAKE trial! I'm writing this review after using it. Mandu loves snake-shaped stick toys in particular, so when CATCH THE SNAKE—a snake toy combined with the auto toy concept—came out, there's no way she wouldn't like it~! After using it for over a week, here are my thoughts! ❤️PROS 1. Cute appearance: The toy design is so adorable ㅋㅋㅋ You can just toss it in the living room and it doesn't take up space—it's got such a nice decorative vibe. Sometimes when I see it while half-asleep, I even mistake it for Mandu ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 2. Rechargeable toy: The CATCH THE MOUSE's downside was having to buy batteries in bulk on Coupang ㅠㅠ But the SNAKE is rechargeable, and after charging it for just one day when it arrived, it kept working for 5 days straight—the value for money is amazing~!~! 3. Versatility: No words needed (positive) When I try to film videos, she becomes a statue ㅠㅠㅠ and I can't get any footage, but when I turn it on before going out, she doesn't care whether I leave or not and just stares at the snake all day...I feel a bit left out honestly... Since it has a loop design, you can swap out different baits besides the snake, so I attach different toys each day! (Though the snake still gets the best reaction) And everything else—there's really no reason not to buy it~~ But if I had to mention a few slightly disappointing points... 💦CONS 1. It's slow: For Mandu, who's used to the mouse, the rotation speed is a bit slow!! It's not that she doesn't react, but she doesn't dash at it—she just lies down and plays with the snake ~~ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Which is cute in its own way ㅜㅜ But for cats that like speed, this might be a bit disappointing! 2. The rustling fabric is small: There's a tiny size difference compared to the mouse ~~But honestly, I was disappointed at first, but seeing her play with it well, I realize only the cat parent is disappointed and the cat doesn't even care ◜◡◝.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ But really, this is a toy that cats just can't dislike...!-!.!-!-! I even turned it on for my friend's 8-year-old cat, and she immediately reacted to it....!!!!!! This is a toy that kittens and adult cats alike play with~!!💕

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
외동묘인 밍밍이는 혼자 있는 동안 집사가 없어 외로움을 느끼거나 지루해하지 않도록 먹이퍼즐과 자동장난감을 꼭 해주고 있는데요! 기존 장난감에 익숙해져서 반응이 적어진 요즘 딱 맞는 선물이 되었어요 :)

캐치더스네이크의 특징으로는 ദ്ദി^ᴗ ̫ ᴗ^₎
•Type-C 충전식으로 간편하게 오래 사용
•15분 타이머로 작동 후 휴식까지 걱정 없는 장난감
•트윙클, 스네이크 두 가지 리필토이로 지루할 틈 없는 사냥
•바스락천으로 소리만으로도 호기심 유발
•어느 공간에도 어울릴 기본컬러 블랙 & 화이트 디자인 🖤🤍

블랙 & 화이트 디자인으로 어느 공간에도 어울리고 건전지 필요 없이 동봉된 C타입으로 충전해서 간편히 사용할 수 있어서 더 좋았어요! 자동장난감이 익숙치 않은 친구들은 바스락천 없이 친해질 시간을 준 뒤에 바스락천을 덮어주어 단계를 올려주면 되어 걱정 없고 밍밍이는 역시 천 없이 작동했을 땐 지켜만 보다가 천을 덮은 뒤 스네이크 리필을 작동시켜주니 천 아래로 얼굴을 넣아보기도 하고 박스 뒤에 숨었다가 사냥하기도 하고 흥분해서 하악질을 할 정도로 열심히 뛰어놀았답니다 =≡Σ((( つ•̀ω•́)つ
 
KC인증을 받은 안전한 장난감 #캐치더스네이크 🐍
바스락 소리만 나도 멀리서 눈이 반짝이는 자동장난감으로 우리 아가들 사냥본능을 충족시켜 주세요 🖤
reviews.content_en: My only cat Mingming gets separation anxiety or boredom when I'm away, so I always make sure to give her puzzle feeders and automatic toys! These days she's become so used to her existing toys that her reactions have dulled, so this was the perfect gift at just the right time :) The features of CATCH THE SNAKE are ദ്ദി^ᴗ ̫ ᴗ^₎ • Type-C rechargeable for convenient, long-lasting use • 15-minute timer so it works and rests without you having to worry • Two refill toys (Twinkle and Snake) for endless hunting fun • Rustling fabric that sparks curiosity just with its sound • Classic black and white design that fits any space 🖤🤍 The black and white design goes with any room, and since it doesn't need batteries and comes with a Type-C charger, it's even more convenient! For cats unfamiliar with automatic toys, you can give them time to get used to it without the rustling fabric first, then add the fabric to level up—no stress. When I first ran it without the fabric, Mingming just watched it, but once I added the fabric and turned on the snake refill, she stuck her face under the fabric, hid behind boxes to hunt, and even chattered her teeth in excitement while playing hard =≡Σ((( つ•̀ω•́)つ KC-certified safe toy #CATCHTHESNAKE 🐍 Even just the rustling sound makes their eyes sparkle from far away—this automatic toy fulfills your kitty's hunting instincts perfectly 🖤

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
✔️추천용도
1️⃣본격 사냥놀이 전 예열용
저희집 첫째가 사냥놀이하기까지 예열이 꽤 필요한 스타일인데 캐치더스네이크가 딱 제격이었어요! 호기심 자극돼서 냥이 본능 깨우는 데 효과 톡톡이더라구요😆 집사 팔뚝 떨어지기 전에 사냥놀이로 자연스럽게 이어질 수 있어서 만족했습니다

2️⃣다묘가정 집중사냥놀이 대기템
다묘가정은 꼭 한 마리씩 사냥타임 충족시켜줘야 하다보니, 한마리 놀아줄때 다른 고양이들이 기다리는 시간이 힘들지 않도록 나름 집사 대체 가능한 점이 너무 좋았어요!! 다묘 가정 추천 꿀 육묘템입니다👍🏻👍🏻

✔️장점
🩵고퀄리티 마감/냥이 옹기종기템
-고양이 호기심 자극하는 재질의 원단이랑 기호성 좋은 리필장난감 덕분에 관심폭발이에요 집사뿌듯
-속도랑 방향조절 가능해서 완급조절해가며 놀아줄 수 있어서 금방 안질릴것 같아요!!
-바닥 미끄럼방지 고무도 있고 본체가 튼튼한게 느껴져서 만족스럽습니다

🩵C타입 충전식
: 배터리 교체식 장난감은 주기적인 교체도 해줘야 하지만, 사용시간에 따라 출력이 동일하지 않을 때가 있어서 불편했는데, 이제품은 한번 충전해두면 냥이가 사용하는 내내 안정적으로 사용할 수 있어서 좋았어요

🩵교체식 리필
: 제공되는 두개의 장난감 외에도 집에 있는 다른 장남감으로 손쉽게 교체할 수 있어서 오래 사용할 수 있을 것 같아요👍🏻
reviews.content_en: ✔️Recommended uses 1️⃣Warm-up before serious hunting play My oldest needs quite a bit of warm-up before she gets into hunting mode, and CATCH THE SNAKE was perfect for that! It really works great at sparking curiosity and awakening that hunting instinct 😆 She naturally transitions into actual hunting play without my forearms getting destroyed, and I'm really satisfied! 2️⃣Waiting toy for multi-cat households with focused hunting play In multi-cat homes, you have to give each cat their hunting time, and it was so helpful to have something that can substitute for me so the other cats don't have a hard time waiting! This is a must-have kitten-raising item for multi-cat households 👍🏻👍🏻 ✔️PROS 🩵High-quality finish / Cat-gathering toy - Thanks to the material that stimulates cat curiosity and the appealing refill toys, they're showing tons of interest. Cat parent feeling proud 💕 - Speed and direction are adjustable, so you can control the pace and they won't get bored quickly!! - The non-slip rubber on the bottom and sturdy body feel solid and satisfying 🩵Type-C rechargeable - Battery-replacement toys require periodic changes, and sometimes the output isn't consistent depending on usage, which was inconvenient. But with this product, once you charge it, it works stably throughout your cat's playtime ✔️ 🩵Replaceable refills - Besides the two toys provided, you can easily swap in other toys from home, so you can use it for a long time 👍🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
​여러분, 이거 진짜 대박이에요!! 저희 집 퐁킹이랑 킹콩이가 아주 그냥 미친 듯이 좋아해서 리뷰를 안 쓸 수가 없네요! 😭💖 평소엔 세상 얌전한 척하던 녀석들이 이 장난감만 나타나면 눈빛부터 돌변해서 우다다 뛰어다니는데, 진짜 사냥꾼이 따로 없더라고요!
​특히 저처럼 두 마리 키우시는 다묘 집사님들 주목! 애들이 한꺼번에 달려들면 금방 망가지거나 흥미를 잃을까 봐 걱정했는데, 이건 움직임이 워낙 화려하고 빨라서 두 녀석의 사냥 본능을 200% 충족시켜 줘요! 퐁킹이가 쫓으면 킹콩이가 매복하고, 아주 자기들끼리 스펙터클한 액션 영화 한 편 찍는 중입니다. 🎬✨
​자동으로 이리저리 사냥감처럼 움직이니까 제가 굳이 흔들어주지 않아도 돼서 너무 편하고요! 애들 스트레스 풀리는 게 눈에 보여서 집사인 제 마음이 다 시원해요. "우리 애는 입맛이 까다로워요~" 하는 고양이들도 이건 절대 못 참을걸요?
​우리 퐁킹이 킹콩이가 보증하는 꿀템! 다묘 가정의 평화와 고양이들의 행복을 위해 캐치더스네이크는 사랑입니다...❤️ 다들 고민 말고 일단 지르세요, 후회 1도 없어요! #체험단
reviews.content_en: You guys, this is seriously amazing!! 😭💖 Our Pongking and Kongkong absolutely go crazy for it, I just had to leave a review! These guys normally act all well-behaved, but the moment this toy shows up, their eyes light up and they're zooming around like crazy - they're basically little hunters! Especially for multi-cat households like mine, pay attention! I was worried they'd tear it up or get bored quick once they both pounce on it at once, but this thing moves so dramatically and fast that it totally satisfies both of their hunting instincts by like 200%! When Pongking chases, Kongkong sets up an ambush - it's like watching them film their own action movie together. 🎬✨ Since it moves around automatically like prey, I don't even have to shake it myself, which is super convenient! And I can literally see the stress melting away from the kids, so my cat mom heart is so happy. You know those picky eater cats that say "my kitty is very particular~"? Trust me, they won't be able to resist this one. This honey item is approved by our Pongking and Kongkong! For the peace of multi-cat households and the happiness of our cats, CATCH THE SNAKE is love... ❤️ Don't overthink it, just buy it - zero regrets! #ProductTester

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
초코는 사냥놀이 반응이 적고 처음 가지고노는 장난감에도 반응이 없거나 금방 질려하는 고양이인데요.

‘캐치더스네이크’는 좀 다르더라구요!

그동안 많은 장난감 리필과 자동장난감으로 놀아줘봤는데
반응이 없거나 짧게 놀고 관심이 떨어지거나 자동장난감같은 경우 무서워서 다가가지도 못하는것들이 대부분이었는데 캐치더스네이크는 익숙한 지렁이 리필이여서 그런지 한동안 계속 집중하는 모습에 매우 놀랐는데요! 거기다 무거운 궁디까지 움직이며 잡는 모습에 초코집사는 매우 감격했어요!

역동적으로 움직이며 사냥하는것도 사냥놀이지만 사냥감을 노리며 집중하는것도 사냥놀이중 하나라고 알고있어서 다른 냥이들에 비해서는 매우 정적인 반응이지만 초코기준 엄청 관심있어보이는 모습에 너무 기뻤습니다!

더구나 기존 건전지로 작동하는 자동장난감과는 다르게 충전형에 장난감리필도 구성품만으로 쓸수있는게 아니라 평소 좋아하던 리필도 달아줄수있어 가성비 짱짱템인거같아요!
reviews.content_en: Choco doesn't usually respond much to hunting play and often doesn't react to new toys or gets bored quickly. But CATCH THE SNAKE is different! I've tried lots of toy refills and automatic toys before, but most of them either got no response, were played with briefly before being ignored, or scared her so much she wouldn't even approach them. But because CATCH THE SNAKE uses the familiar worm refill, I was so shocked at how focused she stayed on it for such a long time! Plus, watching her catch the heavy rear end as it moves around really touched this cat mom's heart! I know that hunting play includes both dynamic chasing and focusing on prey to stalk it. Even though Choco's response is quieter compared to other cats, seeing her show so much interest made me so happy! On top of that, unlike battery-operated automatic toys, this one is rechargeable with a USB-C, and I can swap in her favorite refills from home instead of just using the included ones - it's seriously great value for money!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미의 캐치더스네이크🐍
뱀을 잡아라! 

첫번째 캐치더마우스가 굉장히 탐났는데… 자동장난감에 대한 편견으로 인해 망설이다가 우연히 집에 오게 된 캐치더스네이크! 

일단 애기들이 좋아해요..

장단점 / 추천 대상 / 코멘트 

장점✨
-> 설치 및 사용이 쉬워요! 생각보다 견고하고, 움직임이 일정하지 않아 고양이의 관심이 쉬이 끊이지 않습니다 
애들이 좋아해요… 완전 신나게 집중 중
다양한 미끼 사용이 가능하고, 바스락 소리도 고양이들이 좋아합니다 

단점✨
-> 조금 격한 아이들이면 움직임이 멈추거나 하는 경우가 있어요! 기기 결함은 아니고 애들이 미끼를 꽉 잡아서 그렇습니다 

추천 대상✨
-> 다묘 가정! 
한마리가 이걸로 놀 때 한마리를 놀아줄 수 있어요 

-> 느린 사냥을 선호하는 고양이! 
조금 빠른 템포를 원하는 고양이는 기다리는 시간을 못 참아서, 고양이 사냥 스타일이 대기-> 잡기!면 되게 잘 쓸 것 같아요 

-> 직장인 집사…
하루에 잠깐은 이걸로 사냥을 대신 할 수 있을 것 같아요. 사냥 방식에 다양화를 줄 수 있어요! 누워서… 아무것도 못하겠는 날에 좋은 꼼수(?)가 되어줄 것 입니다 

코멘트✨
-> 전반적으로 긍정적인 평가를 주고 싶습니다! 사냥놀이 하루에 2번씩은 꼭꼭 해주어야 하지만 너무 힘든날에 도움이 될것 같아요 

개인적으로는 단점이라고 해봤자 모든 자동장난감이 가지고 있는 단점들이라… 그 단점을 최소화한 느낌이에요 

서브 장난감으로 너무 좋을 것 같습니다! 다채로운 움직임도 좋고 움직일때 바스락 거라는 소리, 만듦새도 튼튼하고 마감도 좋은 편이에요… 캐치더마우스도 가지고 싶어요

또 사냥놀이 격하게 해서 힘들 때 잠깐 쉬는 시간으로도 너무 좋습니다! 개구호흡 방지 겸 잠깐 쉬는 시간을 주시고, 안 쓰실 땐 꼭 치워주세요! 

게다가 힙한 건 덤입니다…✨
reviews.content_en: BITE ME's CATCH THE SNAKE 🐍 Catch the snake! I really wanted the first CATCH THE MOUSE, but I hesitated because of my bias against automatic toys. Then by chance, CATCH THE SNAKE came to our home! First of all, the kids love it. PROS ✨ -> Setup and use are easy! It's more sturdy than expected, and since the movement isn't repetitive, the cats' interest doesn't fade easily. The kids love it... they're totally focused and excited. You can use various baits, and the rustling sound that comes with it - cats love that too! CONS ✨ -> With some more aggressive kids, the movement can sometimes stop! It's not a device defect, it's just that they grab the bait really tightly. RECOMMENDED FOR ✨ -> Multi-cat households! While one plays with this, you can entertain the other one. -> Cats who prefer slower hunting! Cats that want a faster tempo won't be able to wait, so if your cat's hunting style is wait-and-catch, this will work great! -> Working cat parents... this can substitute for hunting play for a bit each day. It adds variety to hunting methods! On days when you're lying down and can't do much, it's a nice little trick (?) to have. COMMENTS ✨ -> I'd like to give this overall positive feedback! You should do hunting play twice a day, but on really tough days this will be a lifesaver. Personally, any cons are ones that all automatic toys have anyway... this one seems to minimize those cons. It's going to be such a great supplementary toy! The varied movements are great, the rustling sound when it moves, the solid build quality, good finishing... I want CATCH THE MOUSE too. It's also perfect for taking a quick break when hunting play gets too intense! It helps prevent hyperventilation too. Just make sure to put it away when you're not using it! Plus it looks cool... that's a bonus ✨

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
c타입 충전방식이라서 더 편하게 사용가능했어요!!
리필은 원하는걸로 교체가능해서 질리지 않게 놀아줄 수 있었어요 리필 두가지기 동봉되어있어서 좋았어요 아직 자동장난감이 익숙하지 않다면 바스락천을 빼고 먼저 친숙해지게 한 다음 바스락천을 덮어주면 더 재미있게 사냥놀이를 즐길 수 있답니다 랑이도 처음에는 낯설어하다가 천 밑으로 들어가기도하고 신기해하면서 재미있게 잘 놀더라구요 컬러감도 블랙, 화이트라 인테리어에도 찰떡이고 KC인증을 받은 안전한 장난감이라 안심하고 사용할 수 있어요
reviews.content_en: The USB-C charging method made it even more convenient to use! Since the refill is interchangeable with whatever you want, you can keep your cat entertained without getting bored. I loved that two different refills came included. If your cat isn't familiar with automatic toys yet, try removing the rustling cloth first and let them get comfortable with it, then cover it with the cloth and they'll enjoy hunting play even more. At first my cat found it strange, but then she started going under the cloth and playing with it interestingly and enjoying it. The color scheme with black and white is perfect for interior design too, and since it's KC certified, it's a safe toy you can use with peace of mind!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
캣초딩 막내를 위해 바잇미의 캐치더스네이크를 받아보았습니다. 집에 비슷한 장난감이 있는데 배터리를 갈아야 해서 불편했는데 C핀 충전식이라 너무 편했어요! 
그리고 동봉된 장난감은 고양이라만 좋아할 기다란 뱀 같은 장난감과 반짝거리는 나비모양이었는데 리필을 집에 있는걸로 바꿀 수 있게 되어있어서 진짜 좋았어요! 

집에 있는 예전 장난감은 리필을 따로 구매해야 하고 애들이 질려해서 불편했는데 장난감 리필을 다양하게 바꿔서 놀아줄 수 있다니!! 너무 만족스럽습니다.
reviews.content_en: I got BITE ME's CATCH THE SNAKE for our youngest kitten in cat preschool. We had a similar toy at home, but it was inconvenient because we had to change batteries. This one is USB-C rechargeable, so it's so convenient! The included toys were a long snake-like toy that the cats loved and a sparkly butterfly-shaped one, but I could swap the refills with ones we already had at home - which was really great! Our old toy at home required buying separate refills and the kids got tired of it, but now I can swap out a variety of refill toys to play with them! I'm so satisfied!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
저희 집 네마리들은 넷다 놀이 반응이 좋아서 모두를 만족시키기엔 집사가 너무 힘든 집인데요🥹 
다른 자동화놀이기구도 많이 사서 시도해봤는데 전부 관심이 10분 정도가 지나면 사그라들더라구요... 

근데 이건 질리지도 않는지 서로 돌아가면서 계속 달려들어서 놀고있습니다ㅎ.ㅎ 아무래도 평소에 놀아줄때 집에 가구들 사이로 장난감을 흔들어주는걸 좋아했는데 이것도 바스락 거리는 소리랑 보일락말락 하는걸 재미있어 하는 것 같아요
평소에 애들이 좋아하는 장난감을 교환해주며 걸어주니 관심없어 떠나가다가도 다시 돌아오고 난리입니다ㅎ.ㅎ 

게다가 충전식이라서 더 좋은 것 같아요!  그동안의 기계들은 다 건전지 교환식이라서 한번 놀아주고 배터리를 안빼두면 금방 죽어있어서 놀아주고 싶을때 못놀아줄때도 많았는데 이건 그럴 걱정이 없어서 다행입니다ㅎ.ㅎ

끊임없이 놀고 있는데 사진이랑 영상이 더 안올라가는게 슬플따름이네요.. 🥹
최근에 사용해본 자동화 장난감중에 제일입니다😎✌️
reviews.content_en:
Our household has four cats and they all love to play, so it's hard for us as their caretaker to keep up with all of them 🥹
We've tried many other automatic toys, but they all lose their interest after about 10 minutes...

But with this one, they never seem to get bored—they keep taking turns chasing and playing with it! 😄 I think it's because they normally love when I wiggle toys between the furniture at home, and they seem to enjoy the rustling sound and the peek-a-boo effect of this toy too.
Since I swap it with their other favorite toys and put it down, they even come back to it after wandering off, causing a whole commotion! 😄

Plus, the fact that it's rechargeable is amazing! All the previous toys had replaceable batteries, so if I didn't take the batteries out after playing, they'd die quickly and I couldn't play with them whenever I wanted. But with this one, I don't have to worry about that! 😄

They never stop playing, so it's sad that I can't upload more photos and videos.. 🥹
Out of all the automatic toys I've used recently, this one is the best! 😎✌️

reviews.name: 시****
reviews.content:
체험단 후기 입니다! 
노는거 진짜 좋아하는 까까가 한참 가지고 놀았어요 ㅎㅎ 자동 장난감 오랜만에 주니 일단 집사가 편해서 좋았고, 구성품이 생각보다 알차더라구요. 조립도 쉽고 바스락거리는 소재로 가려져있어서 더 좋아했어요. 
주치의 선생님이 활동량 늘려서 운동과 다이어트가 필요하다고 했는데 덕분에 신나게 놀았답니다. 
흥미가 약간 식을 즈음에 바스락 거리는 가리개 밑에 사로 몇 알 숨겨두니 그거 찾아먹는 재미에 또 신나게 놀았어요ㅎㅎ 집사는 편하고 고앵이는 즐겁고 추천입니다.
참, 자동장난감이라 소음은 좀 있어요. 소심한 둘째 고앵이는 소음때문인지 멀리서 내외했어요~
reviews.content_en:
This is my experience as a trial reviewer!
Kakka, who really loves playing, had a great time with it ㅎㅎ It was nice having an automatic toy after a while—it made life easier for me as a caretaker, and the included components were better than expected. It was easy to assemble and the rustling fabric covering made it even more appealing.
My vet said Kakka needs to increase activity for exercise and diet, and thanks to this toy, they played excitedly!
When the interest started to fade a bit, I hid some treats under the rustling fabric cover, and they had a blast hunting for them ㅎㅎ It makes life easier for this caretaker, brings joy to the cat, and I'd definitely recommend it.
Oh, and since it's an automatic toy, there is some noise. My second cat, who's a bit shy, kept their distance because of the noise~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
고양이 장난감이지만 저희 강아지는 혼자 노는걸 흥미 있어 하지않아요 과거에 쥐를 잡던 슈나우저인데 지금도 장난감을 뺏어가며 같이 놀아줘야 해요 전에도 고양이 낚시대에 흥미를 느껴서 잘 가지고 놀거라 생각했는데 역시나 너무 잘 가지고 놀고 활짝 웃으며 놀더라고요  저희 강아지 같은 다른 강아지들에게 추천합니다
✔️C타입 충전식-건전지 교체 할 필요 없다
✔️랜덤모드 15분 자동타이머-랜덤으로 움직이며 흥미유발

✔️바스락 원단-바스락 소재의 천으로 소리와 가림으로 흥미유발
#체험단
reviews.content_en:
It's a cat toy, but our dog doesn't seem interested in playing alone. He's a former Schnauzer who used to catch mice, so he still needs us to play with him by taking the toy back and forth. I thought he'd be interested in cat fishing rods from before and play with them well, but he really did play with this one great and had a big smile on his face while playing! I'd recommend this to other dogs like ours.
✔️C-type rechargeable—no need to replace batteries
✔️Random mode 15-minute auto timer—moves randomly to spark interest
✔️3 difficulty levels—3 speed adjustments available
✔️Replaceable refill toys—Snake and Twinkle
✔️Rustling fabric—rustling material that sparks interest through sound and concealment
#TrialReview

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
[궁디팡팡] 바잇미 캐치더스네이크
드디어 나온 충전식 장난감 내가 원한거 이거잖아!!!!

✔ 캐치더스네이크 특징
1. C타입 충전식으로 간편하게 오래 사용 가능!
2. 두가지 리필토이로 지루할 틈이 없음!
3. 시크한 화이트앤 블랙디자인 인테리어 효과 굳👍

정말로 우리 로몽이는 취향이 확실히 달라서 쥐꼬리와 트윙클을 각각 따로 좋아함.. 이런 냥집사들에개 냥이덕..><

손쉬운 조립으로 외로운 시간을 해소시키기 딱이고,, 

슬로우, 패스트, 랜던 모드로 지루해질 틈이 없좌나~~

우리 뚱냥이 몽이에겐 다이어트 효과를, 사냥놀이 좋아하는 로니에겐 즐거운 사냥시간을!! 이거이거 1석2조 너무 좋습니다

고양이들은 장난감이 눈에 보이면 금방 흥미를 잃은다는데요~ 담아온 상자에 놀이가 끝나면 정리해주면 끄읏~ 충전식이라 아주 오랫동안 재밌게 잘 놀아줄수 있어서 좋네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
[Booty Bounce] BITE ME Catch the Snake
Finally, a rechargeable toy came out—this is exactly what I wanted!!!!

✔ Catch the Snake Features
1. Easy to use for a long time with C-type rechargeable!
2. Two refill toys mean there's never a dull moment!
3. Chic black and white design with great interior aesthetic 👍

Our Lomong really has different preferences—they each like the mouse tail and twinkle separately.. This is heaven for cat parents like us.. ><

With simple assembly, it's perfect for relieving lonely moments,

With slow, fast, and random modes, there's no time to get bored~~

For our chubby cat Mong, it gives them exercise for a diet, and for Roni who loves hunting play, it's an exciting hunting time!! This is truly killing two birds with one stone—it's so good!

Cats tend to lose interest quickly when they can see the toy, so we just put it away in the box when playtime is over and that's it~ Since it's rechargeable, it's great because we can keep them entertained and playing for a very long time ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이번 신상 캐치미 스네이크 🐍
캐치미 마우스와 다른점이 있다면 충전식이고 비닐재질이라는점 
이 점이 너무나도 크게 다가왔는데요 ! 비닐에 환장하는 고양이라 돌아갈때부터 호감이더라구요 


▫️트윙클 장난감 , 바스락 천 두가지버전
▫️15분 시간타이머 / 랜덤, 슬로우, 패스트 세가지

고양이가 집사없이 혼자놀때도 환장하고 놀고
눕고 뛰고 열심히 놀더라구요 진짜 만족 ㅎㅎㅎ
자동장난감중에 여기 장난감이 짱이에요 ! 
속도도 랜덤도 가능하고 타이머도있어서 편리한거같아요
그리고 이번 장난감은 충전식이라 더 좋네요
reviews.content_en:
This new Catch Me Snake 🐍
The difference from Catch Me Mouse is that it's rechargeable and made of vinyl material.
This difference really stood out to me! Since my cat goes crazy for vinyl, they already liked it from the moment we brought it home.

▫️Twinkle toy and rustling fabric—two versions
▫️15-minute timer / Random, Slow, Fast—three modes

My cat goes crazy playing with it alone even without me, and they run, lie down, jump, and play hard~ really satisfying ㅎㅎㅎ
Out of all automatic toys, this one is the best!
You can adjust the speed, use random mode, and there's a timer, so it's really convenient.
And I love that this toy is rechargeable even more.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
🐍 바잇미 캐치더스네이크 🐍
체험단을 통해 이 제품을 접하게 됐어요!
평소 고양이가 오뎅꼬치를 여기저기 숨겼다가 보여주는 숨바꼭질 놀이를 엄청 즐겨했는데요! 
해당 제품은 고양이의 놀이 니즈를 정확히! 간파한 제품이더라구요~

3단계 작동 모드로 다양하게! 작동 처음부터도 거부감없이 씐나게 잘 놀구요! 무엇보다 USB-C 타입 포트로 충전이 매우 간편해서 좋았습니다 :) 

실 사용한지 일주일정도 됐는데 고양이가 발바닥에 땀흘려가면서 놉니다☺️
직장때문에 장시간 집을 비우느라 맘이 불편하신 분들!!
완전 강추드립니다 (고양이가 너무 잘 놀아요ㅜㅜ)
reviews.content_en:
🐍 BITE ME CATCH THE SNAKE 🐍
I got to try this product through a brand experience program!
My cat absolutely loves playing a hide-and-seek game where she hides her odeng skewer toy everywhere and then shows it to me!
This product really nails exactly what cats need to play with! 🎯

With 3 different operation modes, it works great! My cat started playing with it right away without any hesitation! Plus, the USB-C charging port makes it super convenient to charge :)

It's been about a week since we started using it, and my cat plays with it so hard she breaks a sweat on her paws ☺️
If you're worried about leaving your cat alone for long hours because of work!!
I highly recommend it (my cat plays with it so much ㅜㅜ)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이전부터 구매할까 고민하던 장난감이라 엄청 반가웠어요!!
고영희 맘에 들어갔다 나왔는지 처음부터 관심을 많이 보였어요

바스락 재질에 두가지 리필로 고양이가 지루 할 틈없이 
아주 정신을 쏙 빼놓습니다요 

충전도 c타입으로 편리하게 리뉴얼 되어 자동 장난감에 대한 부담감도 덜었어요! 

속도 조절도 2단 가능하며 랜덤기능은 15분 후에 자동으로 종료되어 저는 랜덤기능을 주로 이용하게 되더라구요 
젤리에겐 속도가 조금 더 빠르면 좋겠다 생각했지만 
움직임이 정말 숨었다 나왔다 요리조리 살아있는 모션에 젤리두 흥미를 많이 보였어요 

새로운 자동 장난감 찾으신다면 강추 입니다!!
reviews.content_en:
I'd been thinking about buying this toy for a while, so I was so excited!!
Young-hee seemed to like it right from the start and showed a lot of interest

With the crinkly material and two refills, my cat never gets bored—it completely captures her attention

Charging was upgraded to USB-C which is super convenient, so I feel less burdened about using an automatic toy!

Speed can be adjusted in 2 levels, and the random mode automatically stops after 15 minutes, so I mainly use the random mode
I thought Jelly might enjoy a slightly faster speed, but the movements are so lifelike—hiding and appearing, moving around naturally—that Jelly showed a lot of interest too

If you're looking for a new automatic toy, I highly recommend it!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
10살 저희아이가 왠만한 장난감에 반응 안하는대 !
비닐로된있어서 아이들이 좋아하는
재질에 장난감도 움직기면서 비닐 소리가 나니까 
더 자극적인 거 같아요 왠만한 자동 장난감 사다 주면 쳐다도 안 보는 저희 아이가 바잇미 장난감은 정말 좋아해요
장난감이 멈춰도 그 위에 올라가 있어요 ! 멈춰 있는 상태에서도 잘 갖고 놀고 움직이는 상태에서도 잘 갖고 놀아요!
멈춰있으면 본인꺼라고 건들지도못하게 합니다
완전 대만족이네요~~!!!!
reviews.content_en:
My 10-year-old cat doesn't respond to most toys!
But since this one is made of vinyl—the material cats love—and makes crinkling sounds when it moves, it seems extra stimulating
My cat usually ignores most automatic toys I buy her, but she really loves the BITE ME toy!
She stays on top of it even when it stops moving! She plays with it whether it's standing still or moving!
When it stops, she acts like it's hers and won't let anyone touch it
I'm completely satisfied~~!!!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 일단 조립하는 데 문제 없었고 엄청 쉬워요!! ㅎㅎ 처음에 적응하는 데에 시간이 좀 오래 걸렸는데 좀 지나니까 슬슬 가지고 놀더라구요 😁 모드나 난이도 설정할 수 있는 게 가장 장점인 것 같아요! 하나의 장난감으로 여러 놀이를 할 수 있어서 좋아요~ 배터리도 충전해 두면 꽤 오래 사용할 수 있어요. 무엇보다 가지고 노는 게 너무 귀여워요 🫰😆  혼자 놀 때 딱 좋은 장난감입니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: First of all, assembly was no problem at all and super easy!! ㅎㅎ It took a little while for her to get used to it at first, but after a bit she started playing with it 😁 I think the best part is being able to set different modes and difficulty levels! You can get multiple types of play from one toy, which is great~ The battery lasts pretty long once it's charged. And watching her play with it is just so cute 🫰😆 It's the perfect toy for solo playtime ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
우선 건전지가 아닌 C-type 충전식이라 좋았고, 한 가지가 아닌 두 가지 방식으로 놀아줄 수 있는 점이 신기했어요 👍
⠀
리필토이가 2개나 들어있어서 바꿔가면서 사용하고, 나중에 지루해지면 아예 다른걸로 교체할 수 있어서 활용도가 높더라구요!
⠀
외출할 때 설치해주고 갔더니 아주 혼자 신나게 노는 모습에 너무 뿌듯했답니다,,🥹
⠀
귀여운 디자인의 충전식 장난감 “캐치 더 스네이크” 추천해요🖤
reviews.content_en:
First of all, I loved that it's USB-C rechargeable instead of using batteries, and it was cool that it has two different play modes, not just one 👍

It comes with 2 refill toys, so you can swap them out, and if she gets bored later, you can replace it with something completely different, so it's really versatile!

I set it up before going out and came back to see her having so much fun playing by herself—I was so proud,,🥹

I recommend "CATCH THE SNAKE"—a cute, rechargeable automatic toy 🖤

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
캐치더마우스 ,,? 였나요 이전 버전 내돈내산으로 구매한 적이 있는데 확실히 구 버전과 차이점이 있다면 천사이즈가 작아져서 장난감이 더 잘 보여 좋달까요 🥹? 건전지가 아닌 충전식인 점도 너무 좋아요 ,, ( 사실 구 버전 건전지 2번 교체 이후로 건전지 구매 귀차니즘 이슈로 구석에 박아둠 이슈 ^_ㅜ)
애들 기호도는 말모 ,, 환장합니더 ^^🖤
reviews.content_en:
Was it CATCH THE MOUSE? I bought the previous version with my own money before, and if there's a definite difference between the old and new versions, it's that the toy size got smaller so you can see the toy better 🥹? I also love that it's rechargeable instead of battery-powered ,, (honestly, after replacing the batteries twice on the old version, I ended up shoving it in a corner because I was too lazy to keep buying batteries ^_ㅜ)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 새롭게 출시된 자동 장난감!
기존 제품과 다르게 건전지 사용이 아닌 
C타입 충전식으로 더 편해졌어요😚

결합해 사용할 수 있어 질리지 않고 좋아요!!

바스락 천 없이 낚싯대 만으로도 재밌게 가지고 놀아서
집사도 엄청 편하답니다👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
A new automatic toy from BITE ME!
Unlike the existing product, it no longer uses batteries
and instead uses USB-C charging for added convenience😚

Since cats go crazy for the crinkly material,
they concentrate well and play with it, and you can combine it
with various types of toys so they don't get bored and love it!!

Even without the crinkly fabric, just the wand alone is fun to play with,
so it's super convenient for us cat parents too👍🏻

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
일리가 너무 좋아해요~~!
기존 캐치더마우스도 애용중인데, 새로운 버전인 캐치더스네이크가 출시되어서 너무 좋아요!

바스락 원단과 C타입으로 활용도도 더 좋아졌어요~!

집사의 휴식시간을 만들어주는 캐치더스네이크 최고입니다ㅠㅠ!!!
reviews.content_en:
Lily loves it so much~~!
We're already using the existing CATCH THE MOUSE, and we're so happy that the new version CATCH THE SNAKE came out!

With the crinkly fabric and USB-C charging, the versatility is even better~!

CATCH THE SNAKE is the best for giving us cat parents some rest time ㅠㅠ!!!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
고양이가 작년에 사준 꼬리잡기 자동 장난감을 너무 좋아했어요! 그때 제품도 두가지 옵션이 되는 캐치더스네이크랑 똑같은 제품이었는데요~ 패키지 디자인이 너무 화려한 터라 집사인 저는 조금 맘에 안 들더라고요… 펼쳐놓으면 여기저기 어질러져있는 느낌이 강했는데, 캐치 더 스네이크는 검정과 흰색 두가지 컬러로 세련되어서 마음에 듭니다. 미끄럼 방지 다리도 알차게 붙어 있어서 웬만하면 밀리지 않고 잘 가지고 놀 수 있어 좋았어요! 
캐치 더 스네이크가 15분 작동 모드인 랜덤 모드가 있어서 한 번 틀어주면 알아서 꺼져서 좋아요. 일 하다가 가끔 고양이를 보면 정신을 못 차리고 장난감만 바라보는 모습을 볼 수 있는데… 정말 집중력이 강한건지 뭔지… 마치 텔레비전 쏙으로 들어갈 것만 같은 아이를 보는 기분이에요!
reviews.content_en:
My cat loved the automatic tail-chasing toy I got last year so much! That product back then had two options like CATCH THE SNAKE, but the package design was so flashy that I wasn't too keen on it as a cat parent... When you open it up, it felt really cluttered everywhere, but CATCH THE SNAKE comes in two sophisticated colors—black and white—and I really like it. It also has anti-slip pads attached securely, so it plays well without sliding around. CATCH THE SNAKE has a random mode with a 15-minute operation time, so once you turn it on, it shuts off automatically which is great. Sometimes when I'm working and glance at my cat, they're completely focused and just staring at the toy... I'm not sure if it's just strong concentration or what... it's like watching them about to jump into the TV screen!

As soon as you turn it on, both of our teenage cats are hyper-focused!!! We used CATCH THE MOUSE a lot too, but they seem to like the snake even more!! My cat needs rehabilitation from leg surgery, and they run around trying to catch it, so they're naturally getting their rehab in ^^ The material is also crinklier so it stimulates the kids' interest even more~~~ I should turn it on in random mode every time I leave the house💓💓

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 켜주자마자 저희 집 캣초딩 두마리 다 초집중입니다 !!! 캐치더 마우스도 너무 잘썼는데 스네이크를 훨씬 좋아하는거 같아요!! 다리 수술로 재활이 필요한데 요리조리 잡으러 잘 뛰어다니니까 저절로 재활이됩니다 ^^ 소재도 더 바스락거리니까 애들 흥미 더 자극~~~ 집 비울때마다 랜덤으로 켜주고 나가야겠어요💓💓

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 지우는 원래 캣츠케이크를 사용하고 있었는데 요번에 나온 캐치더스네이크는 또다른 재미의 장난감이라 그런지 잘 놀고있어요! 바스락 거리는 걸 좋아하기도하고 ㅋㅋ 사냥놀이보다도 집사가 요런식으로 장난감을 숨겨두면 찾아 잡는 놀이를 더 흥미로워하는데, 이건 그걸 자동으로 해주기 때문에! 집사는 편하게 쉴 수 잇습니다 .. ㅎㅎ 혼자 있는 외동냥이에게도 추천하는 자동장난감이에요 💭🖤
reviews.content_en: Jiwoo was already using CATS CAKE, but this new CATCH THE SNAKE toy is so much fun in a different way! She loves the crinkling sound too lol. She's more interested in finding and catching games when I hide toys like this rather than hunting play, and this toy does that automatically! So I get to rest peacefully 😎. I definitely recommend this automatic toy for only cats who are alone 💭🖤

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희집 냥이들이 엄청좋아해요!☺️
이런 자동장난감은 처음사용히니봤는데 처음에는 어색하하더니 곧 엄청잘쓰더라구요!
리필도 얼마든지 바꿔낄수가있고 충전식이라 더맘에듭니다ㅎㅎ
그냥도좋아하고 바스락커튼?을 해주면 더잘놀아서 자주사용할것같아요!
reviews.content_en: My cats love it so much! ☺️ This is my first time using an automatic toy like this, and it was a bit awkward at first but they got the hang of it really quickly! I can refill it anytime and it's rechargeable which I love even more hehe. They like it as is, but they play with it even more when I do the crinkling curtain thing? So I think we'll use it often!

reviews.name: 태****
reviews.content:
요즘 낚시대 놀이반응이 좀 시큰둥해서 놀아주기 힘들었는데 신상 자동장난감 틀어주니 혼자서 엄청 열심히 노네요. 기존에 이런 종류의 장난감 써봤을때 바닥에 고정이 안되고 자꾸 뒤집어져서 테이프로 붙여서 쓰고 충전할때마다 떼느라 넘 불편했는데 미끄럼 방지 패드가 지지를 잘해줘서 좋아요! 
싫증안내고 잘 놀았으면 좋겠네요 ~~
reviews.content_en: Lately my cat wasn't very interested in fishing rod play so it was hard to entertain her, but when I turned on the new automatic toy she plays so hard by herself. I've used this type of toy before and it wouldn't stay fixed to the floor and kept tipping over, so I had to tape it down which was inconvenient every time I needed to charge it. But this one has great anti-slip pads that keep it in place! I hope she doesn't get bored and keeps playing well ~~

reviews.content: 육아를 하면서 고양이들 사냥놀이에 신경을 못써주고있엇는데 바잇미 캐치더스네이크 자동장난감을 켜줘서 놀게하니 마음이 좀 놓여요. C타입충전이라 편하기도 하고, 집안에 둬도 디자인이 튀지않아 좋네요. 무엇보다 고양이들이 흥미있어해서 다행이네요😀
reviews.content_en: While taking care of my kids I haven't been able to focus on my cats' hunting play, so turning on the BITE ME CATCH THE SNAKE automatic toy to play with puts my mind at ease. It's convenient with USB-C charging, and the design doesn't stand out in the house which is nice. Most importantly, my cats are interested in it so I'm relieved 😀

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
오랫동안 이런 자동 장난감을 사주고 싶었는데, 연결고리부분이 핀같이 쇠로 된건 놀다가 다칠까봐 사주기 꺼려지더라구요.
정말 많은 제품를 찾아봤지만 하나같이 연결 부분이 옷핀이나 동그란 쇠링이아닌 제품을 찾기 힘들었어요.

그런데 이번 바잇미 제품은 쇠없이 장난감을 걸 수 있겠어서 바로 주문했어요

잘가지고 놀아서 너무 좋구요, 패스트-슬로우 랜덤 모드가 있어서 질리지 않고 더 잘 놀거 같아요 ㅋㅋ

그런데 본체-낚시대 연결 부위가 꽂는 형식이다
보니 격하기 놀다보면 빠지네요 ㅜㅜ

돌려서 연결하는 병뚜껑 형식이었으면 더 좋았겠습니다

하지만 저희집 고양이는 아주 대대 만족 중이예요
reviews.content_en: I've wanted to buy an automatic toy like this for a long time, but I was hesitant because the connector part was made of metal like a pin and I was worried they might get hurt while playing. I looked for many products but it was hard to find one where the connector wasn't a safety pin or circular metal ring. But with this BITE ME product, I could hang the toy without any metal so I ordered right away! It's so great that she plays with it, and with the fast-slow random mode she won't get bored and will play even more lol. But the connection part between the main unit and the fishing rod is plug-in style so it comes loose when she plays roughly ㅜㅜ. It would've been better if it was a twist-on cap style. But my cat is super duper satisfied with it!

reviews.content_en: What do I do,,, seems like my cat pulled an all-nighter,,, reality check. After a long time I won the BITE ME CATCH THE SNAKE experience event,,, my seniors at 17 and 16 years old can't play as actively or jump well anymore but it stimulates their hunting dopamine 🥹💙 the best automatic toy! The material crinkles and the toy peeks out a bit so all my usually not-so-active cats went crazy...
